app.name: CoastPulse Transit Atlas
app.tagline: Unofficial map-first transit intelligence for SEQ

fallback.noDataMessage: No live or scheduled departures are currently available for this stop.

disclaimer.short: Unofficial project. Not affiliated with Translink or the Queensland Government.
disclaimer.long: This is an unofficial, independent project. Data may be delayed, incomplete, or approximate. Always verify critical travel decisions via official channels before travel.

privacy.note: Favorites, recents, and quick history are stored only in your browser on this device.

attribution.notes: Replace with exact open-data licensing attribution before public launch.
